builder_1.name: Brand Builder
builder_1.title: BRANDING DISTRICT
builder_1.hint: TAP to grow your brand · catch ⭐, dodge 👎
lesson: A brand is how customers see your business.
A good name and look make you easy to remember.
A clear brand earns trust and repeat buyers.

builder_2.name: Product Lab
builder_2.title: PRODUCT DEV LAB
builder_2.hint: TAP to drop and stack a better product
lesson: A great product solves a real customer problem.
Test and improve before you sell it.
Better quality earns happy, loyal customers.

builder_3.name: Serve Customers
builder_3.title: STARTUP STREET
builder_3.hint: TAP happy customers · avoid bad service
lesson: Good service keeps customers coming back.
Happy customers tell their friends about you.

builder_4.name: Pitch Arena
builder_4.title: INVESTOR PITCH ARENA
lesson: Investors fund ideas that solve real problems.
Know your costs, price, and profit.
Be honest and clear about your numbers.

qs.q: Best way to grow a business?

builder_5.name: Reach Customers
builder_5.title: MARKETING METROPOLIS
builder_5.hint: SWITCH lanes · reach customers, dodge wasted ads
lesson: Marketing tells the right people about you.
Reach the customers who need your product.
Ads aimed at no one waste your money.

builder_6.name: Scale Up
builder_6.title: SCALING CENTER
builder_6.hint: AIM at steady growth · avoid overreach
lesson: Scaling means growing your business carefully.
Grow step by step so you can keep up.
Growing too fast can break a business.
